% Gravity (EGM2008 geoid).  Slope = directly-measured eps-curve log-log slope (PRIMARY); SlopeSE = delete-one-degree jackknife SE; Alpha = weighted spectral index; SlopeSpec = (1-Alpha)/2 asymptotic prediction.
\newcommand{\gravSlope}{-0.861}
\newcommand{\gravSlopeSE}{0.033}
\newcommand{\gravRsq}{0.969}
\newcommand{\gravAlpha}{2.839}
\newcommand{\gravAlphaSE}{0.027}
\newcommand{\gravSlopeSpec}{-0.919}
\newcommand{\gravSlopeSpecSE}{0.013}
\newcommand{\gravLten}{12.1}
\newcommand{\gravLfive}{37.5}
\newcommand{\gravLtwofive}{94.4}
\newcommand{\gravLone}{191.2}
\newcommand{\gravCoeffsOnePct}{37{,}249}
\newcommand{\compressionRatio}{760}

\newcommand{\magSlopeSE}{0.724}
\newcommand{\magRsq}{0.908}
\newcommand{\magAlpha}{7.509}
\newcommand{\magAlphaSE}{0.647}
\newcommand{\magSlopeSpec}{-3.254}
\newcommand{\magSlopeSpecSE}{0.323}
\newcommand{\magLten}{2.5}
\newcommand{\magLfive}{3.4}
\newcommand{\magLtwofive}{4.3}
\newcommand{\magLone}{5.9}
\newcommand{\magCoeffsOnePct}{49}

\newcommand{\lithSlopeSE}{0.037}
\newcommand{\lithRsq}{0.809}

\newcommand{\lithAlphaSE}{0.042}

\newcommand{\lithCoeffsOnePct}{17{,}956}

% Codec / rate-distortion gap (geoid at eps=1%), from codec_gap.json: float32, greedy quantizer and entropy-coded bits relative to the water-fill RD floor.
\newcommand{\codecFloatOverFloor}{11.3}
\newcommand{\codecGapGreedy}{1.59}
\newcommand{\codecGapEntropy}{1.23}

% Geoid undulation extremes (m), DH2 grid at l_ref, degrees 0-1 removed (same field Figure 1 plots).
\newcommand{\geoidMin}{-113}
\newcommand{\geoidMax}{101}

% Dipole power fraction at epoch 2020.0 (B_r degree variance), from temporal_igrf.csv.
\newcommand{\dipoleFracTwentyTwenty}{93.8}

% Finite-band eps-slope of a pure l^-(1-2p) spectrum over the main-field fit window l=1..12 (off-asymptotic demonstration).
\newcommand{\magFiniteBandSlope}{-2.56}
